evals.prompt: I keep missing when OpenCode finishes. Can you set up native macOS notifications so I get a desktop alert when tasks complete or need input? I use Ghostty.
evals.expected_output: Guides the user through opencode-notifier setup, asks for notification system (recommends Ghostty), and configures the plugin and notifier config for macOS/Ghostty.
expectations: Asks which notification system the user wants
Creates or updates opencode-notifier.json with notificationSystem set

evals.prompt: Set up opencode-notifier for me on macOS. I don't use Ghostty, just iTerm. I want reliable notifications even if the icon is Script Editor.
evals.expected_output: Chooses osascript as notification system, updates plugin config, and explains the Script Editor notification permission if needed.
expectations: Asks which notification system the user wants
Recommends osascript for reliability when Ghostty is not used
Mentions Script Editor notifications for macOS

evals.prompt: I want OpenCode to ping me on Linux when a session completes. Can you set up opencode-notifier and tell me how to install notification support?
evals.expected_output: Sets up opencode-notifier plugin, asks for notification system, and provides Linux libnotify install guidance.
expectations: Asks which notification system the user wants
